metadata.description: A GPU / accelerator component. deviceClass covers a physical GPU, a whole-GPU passthrough (VFIO) to a guest, or a vGPU/MIG partition carved from a physical GPU (parentDevice references the physical Hardware.GraphicsProcessor). Mirrors Redfish Processor (ProcessorType=GPU) / PCIeDevice.

deviceClass.description: Device realization (common-elements.md §7). passthrough = whole GPU to a guest; partition = vGPU/MIG slice (set parentDevice + partitionMechanism).

partitionMechanism.description: Only when deviceClass=partition: e.g. mediated (NVIDIA vGPU / Linux mdev), mig, sr-iov.

location.description: PCIe slot / BDF within the parent (Redfish PhysicalLocation). Primary discriminator; for a partition, the vGPU/MIG instance id.

model.description: GPU model, e.g. AMD Radeon Pro W7900 (Redfish Model).

role.description: Semantic usage, e.g. compute | display | inference.

size.description: Framebuffer / device memory, e.g. 48GB (for a vGPU, the profile's allocation).

architecture.description: GPU architecture / generation, e.g. RDNA4, Hopper.

relationships.description: The host the physical GPU is installed in.
For passthrough / partition (vGPU), the guest the device is presented to.
parentDevice — the physical GPU this passthrough/partition (vGPU/MIG) is derived from. REQUIRED when deviceClass is passthrough or partition (common-elements §7).
